note.zh: 在 Cursor CLI 中以 Claude Sonnet 4.6（High 思考配额）一次生成。原始 SVG 的注释中混入非法 XML/编码字节，导致浏览器只渲染到一半并显示解析错误；Codex 仅将这些注释里的坏字符替换为 ASCII 连字符以修复加载错误，未改动任何图形元素。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (High effort) inside Cursor CLI. The original SVG contained invalid XML/encoding bytes inside comments, causing browsers to stop rendering partway through with a parse error; Codex only replaced those bad comment characters with ASCII hyphens to fix loading, without changing any graphical elements.

note.zh: 第二版：在 Cursor CLI 中以 Claude Sonnet 4.6（High 思考配额）一次生成，作为独立 SVG 变体登记，保留原版产物不变。
note.en: Second version: generated in one shot by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (High effort) inside Cursor CLI and registered as a separate SVG variant, preserving the original artifact.
